basic_details.job_title: JNCASR Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) Project Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website of JNCASR. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the JNCASR Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years Candidates with exceptional merit will be considered for age relaxation.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JNCASR Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 11-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR Project Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the JNCASR Project Engineer position is 11th June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Engineer post is a Bachelor of Engineering (BE) degree in Civil engineering. Candidates must possess this qualification to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Engineer position at JNCASR?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Engineer position is 65 years. However, candidates with exceptional merit may be considered for age relaxation as per the organization's policy.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Engineer position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 60,000. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JNCASR Project Engineer vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications for the JNCASR Project Engineer vacancy must be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this JNCASR Project Engineer recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Engineer post at JNCASR involves two main stages: initial application scrutiny followed by an interview conducted by a committee. Candidates will be shortlisted based on these stages.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs, along with your application.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Project Engineer position at JNCASR is a contractual job. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where is JNCASR located?
faq.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560064.
